# Contributing to CasperLaunch

Thank you for your interest in contributing.

## How to Contribute

1. Fork the repository
2. Create a feature branch: `git checkout -b feature/your-feature`
3. Make your changes and test locally
4. Submit a pull request with a clear description of what you changed and why

## Development Setup

See the [README](../README.md) for local development instructions.

## Code Style

- TypeScript strict mode
- No `any` types
- Run `npm run build` before submitting — PRs that fail the build will not be merged

## Reporting Bugs

Open a GitHub issue with steps to reproduce, expected behavior, and actual behavior.

## Security Issues

See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) — do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities.
